deprecated_yaml_import_issue_credentials.description:
Configuring the {integration_title} integration through YAML is deprecated. The integration now requires a password to authenticate to your router, which cannot be safely carried over from YAML.

Set up the integration through the UI to provide your credentials (your existing host `{host}` will need to be re-entered), then remove the `{domain}` entry from your `configuration.yaml` file and restart Home Assistant.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_credentials.title: The {integration_title} YAML configuration is being removed
